_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Review intelligence collection guidance for accuracy/applicability.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in managing AI governance review processes, including intake, triage, stakeholder coordination, assessment execution, and decision documentation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AG domain. AG-S-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-014 (RC, cosine: 0.477), AG-K-007 (AG, cosine: 0.438).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.7/10 (raw 0.468). Shared vocabulary: [review]. DCWF-only terms [accuracy, applicability, collection, guidance, intelligence] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, assessment, coordination, decision, documentation, execution] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.846 (P=0.851, R=0.841). Balanced P/R — the 6-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (95.9%). "Review intelligence collection guidance for accuracy/applicability." and "Skill in managing AI governance review processes, including intake, triage, stak" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.495 ≈ STS 0.468 (gap 0.027). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [review] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.3%. Shared tokens: [review]. DCWF-only: [accuracy, applicability, collection, guidance, intelligence]. WIDAI-only: [ai, assessment, coordination, decision, documentation, execution].
